title: Adventure 0: New Beginnings
description: An alternate quest for your group to try instead of The Trial from the Game System.

title: Adventure 1: Rogar’s Hall
description: Written by Stephen Baker, this quest was designed as a test of strength for the Heroes, and was specifically designed with the Mentor miniature in mind.

title: Adventures 2 - 11 (version a)
description: Originally designed by Stephen Baker and published by Milton Bradley in 1989. HeroQuest was redesigned and rereleased by Avalon Hill in 2021 through a crowdfunding campaign.

title: Adventures 2 - 11 (version b)
description: A “lite” version of the HeroQuest Game System, published by Avalon Hill in 2025. First Light serves as a budget friendly introduction to the world of HeroQuest. Featuring a brand new story, by Stephen Baker, that takes place concurrently to the events of the original Game System.

title: Adventure 13: Forsaken Tunnels of Xor-Xel
description: Designed by Doug Hopkins, this quest was designed to bridge the gap between the Game system and Kellar’s Keep, telling the story of the journey to the Great Gate.

title: Adventures 14 - 23: Kellar's Keep
description: The first official expansion to the HeroQuest Game System. The Heroes are tasked with rescuing the King and his Army, trapped in Kellar’s Keep.

title: Adventures 24 - 36: Prophecy of Telor
description: The storyline of the expansion revolves around a 'fallen dread magician' named Telor, who is trapped inside the Talisman of Lore. The heroes must prevent Zargon from using this to resurrect the sorcerer.

title: Adventures 37 - 40: Spirit Queen's Torment
description: The elven sage Silvana, brilliant diviner and ally of Mentor, has been experiencing visions of spirits surrounding her beloved late apprentice, Nelath, a Spirit Talker slain by Zargon.

title: Adventures 41 - 50: Return of the Witch Lord
description: The Witch Lord has returned! Journey to the great ruins of Kalos to defeat him along with Skulmar and the Witch Queen.

title: Adventure 51: Into the Northlands
description: Take “a chilling journey north” in this prelude quest designed to prepare a solo adventurer for the perils that await them in The Frozen Horror.

title: Adventures 52 - 61: The Frozen Horror
description: Face off against an ancient evil that has reawakened deep within Ice Mountain, The Frozen Horror. Journey on three solo quests designed for the Barbarian before completing the remaining group quests.

title: Adventures 62 - 71: The Mage of the Mirror
description: The Elven Kingdom of Elethorn is in turmoil. Save the Queen’s daughter, Millandriel from the archmage Sinestra. Prove yourself to the Queen in three solo quests, then journey to save the princess in the remaining group quests.

title: Adventure 72: Knight Fall
description: Agents of Zargon have infiltrated the prison. Head to the prison to stop the prison break in progress!

title: Adventures 73 - 82: Rise of the Dread Moon
description: The Elven Princess Millandriel has been saved, but all is not well in Elethorn. As the Night of the Dread moon approaches, you must investigate agents of Zargon working to destroy the kingdom of Elethorn.

title: Adventures 83 - 92: Against the Ogre Horde
description: A vast horde of Ogres has left the Northern Borderlands in ruins. Only the King’s greatest heroes can stop them! Against the Ogre Horde is now available at retail.

title: Adventures 93 - 102: Wizards of Morcar
description: Morcar has gathered the worlds mightiest sorcerers. Seek out these sorcerers and defeat them before they can complete Morcar’s plans.

title: Adventures 103 - 118: The Jungles of Delthrak
description: A Dread curse has taken hold of the Jungle animals and fauna. Travel to the Jungles of Delthrak to recover an ancient Dwarven artifact that was stolen.

title: Adventures 119 - 128: The Crypt of Perpetual Darkness
description: Your homeland has been occupied by the forces of Zargon. Using an ancient map, delve into deep dungeons in search of a long lost crypt.
